privileged_info_summary: This task simulates post-cardiac surgery ICU monitoring using OpenICE, an open-source medical device interoperability platform. The task requires creating 3 simulated medical devices: a Multiparameter Monitor (for vital signs including ECG, SpO2, hemodynamics), a CO2 or respiratory gas monitoring device (for end-tidal CO2), and a third device of choice such as an infusion pump, NIBP monitor, pulse oximeter, temperature adapter, or invasive blood pressure monitor. The Vital Signs clinical application must be launched to confirm data flow from all devices, and a monitoring checklist must be documented at /home/ga/Desktop/monitoring_checklist.txt. The passing score threshold is 60 points out of 100, based on scoring criteria including device creation (10 pts each), app launch (15 pts), device detail view (15 pts), and checklist documentation (40 pts combined). All data is synthetically generated by OpenICE simulators, not from real patients or medical devices.
